name: Aviz Certified Community SONiC
description: A pre-tested, multi-ASIC, enterprise-ready SONiC distribution supporting silicon from NVIDIA, Cisco, Marvell, and Broadcom with 500+ automated tests and 24/7 commercial support.

name: Aviz FTAS
description: Fabric Test Automation Suite (FTAS) is a comprehensive automated testing suite for SONiC comprising 500+ test cases, validating feature quality across multi-vendor hardware and ASIC platforms.

name: Aviz Network Copilot
description: An AI-powered network management assistant that delivers intelligent insights, automated troubleshooting, and conversational operations for SONiC-based networks.

name: Aviz ONES
description: Open Networking Enterprise Suite (ONES) is Aviz Networks' unified SONiC operations platform offering multi-vendor orchestration, deep observability, and real-time alerting with a 30-minute enterprise SLA.

name: Enterprise SONiC by STORDIS
description: STORDIS Enterprise SONiC Distribution is a ruggedised, commercially supported NOS based on Broadcom's SONiC with feature enrichment for data-center, campus, and telecom environments.

name: Hedgehog Open Network Fabric
description: An open-source, Kubernetes-native network fabric powered by SONiC. Provides VPC abstractions, multi-tenant APIs, and automated fabric operations for private cloud and edge deployments.

name: MONSOON by STORDIS
description: MONSOON is STORDIS's open-source network monitoring exporter for SONiC devices, providing affordable telemetry collection from routers and switches.

name: SAI Challenger by PLVision
description: An open-source framework for SAI functional and integration testing built on SONiC's native infrastructure, enabling fast testing of any SAI implementation.

name: SandWork
description: SandWork is PANTHEON.tech's intent-based network orchestration, automation, and assurance platform purpose-built for SONiC. It handles Day 2+ fabric configurations (VXLAN, switchports, MC-LAG) and supports large-scale enterprise SONiC deployments.

name: SONiC Lite by PLVision
description: SONiC Lite is PLVision's lightweight enterprise SONiC distribution optimised for access, edge, campus, and OOB management switches with 30-50% lower hardware requirements.
